Bash(python -c "
import requests, json
r = requests.get\('https://wontech-asia.com/api/clinics?offset=0', headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0', 'Accept': 'application/json'}, timeout=30\)
data = r.json\(\)
print\('keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('hasMore:', data.get\('hasMore'\)\)
print\('total keys \(non-html\):', {k:v for k,v in data.items\(\) if k != 'html'}\)
")
